title: Compass Manhunt
description: Manhunt is a simple serversided fabric mod that uses the classic compass + right clicking to track the speedrunner/s
body:
### Requires Fabric API

# Compass Manhunt

Manhunt is a simple serversided fabric mod that uses the classic compass + right clicking to track the speedrunner/s. You can have multiple runners, and the hunters keep their compass when they die


# Commands (all require op):

/speedrunner add <target> -- add a speedrunner (can have more than just one)

/speedrunner remove <target> --remove a speedrunner

/speedrunner list -- shows who is a speedrunner

/compass -- gives the player that runs this a tracking compass
